data_policy.purpose: Verified public database of Education PhD supervisors for applicants.
data_policy.accuracy_rule: Do not publish a supervisor record unless every factual field is supported by official university pages, supervisor pages, publication databases, or clearly cited authoritative sources.
data_policy.placeholder_rule: No fake names, emails, webpages, publication counts, research interests, or supervision status are allowed.
data_policy.empty_value_rule: Use null, an empty array, or 'not_verified' when a field has not yet been verified.
